category_sources: source_facts.description says AST-based pattern checker for JavaScript; official ESLint site says it statically analyzes JavaScript code to find and fix problems.
display_name_sources: Official site and GitHub repository use the display name ESLint.
docs_sources: Official ESLint documentation page covers using, extending, integrating, contributing to, and maintaining ESLint.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official ESLint GitHub repository is eslint/eslint and links to eslint.org.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says AST-based JavaScript checker; official site describes JavaScript static analysis and code problem fixing.
